zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Beaumont 1st Earl of Warwick於1046年出生在法國諾門迪曼其丹聶維爾時，他的父親Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen24歲，母親Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan32歲。他於1100年與Marguerite Perche在英國瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1119年6月20日在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯凱享年73歲，埋葬在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利普雷奧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry de Beaumont 1st Earl of Warwick于1046年出生在法国諾門迪曼其丹聶維爾时，他的父亲Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen24岁，母亲Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan32岁。他于1100年与Marguerite Perche在英国瓦維其可爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1119年6月20日在法国巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯凱享年73岁，埋葬在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利普雷奧。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Beaumont 1st Earl of Warwick was born in 1046, in Denneville, Manche, Normandy, France, his father, Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen, was 24 and his mother, Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan, was 32. He married Marguerite Perche in 1100, in Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 20 June 1119, in Caen, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France, at the age of 73, and was buried in Préaux, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry de Beaumont 1st Earl of Warwick est né en 1046, à Denneville, Manche, Normandie, France, son père, Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Marguerite Perche en 1100, à Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 20 juin 1119, à Caen, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Préaux, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry de Beaumont 1st Earl of Warwick 1046 in Denneville, Manche, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen 24 und seine Mutter Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan 32. Er hat 1100 in Warwickshire, England Marguerite Perche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 20. Juni 1119 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Caen, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Préaux, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Beaumont 1st Earl of Warwick è nato il nel 1046 nel Denneville, Manche, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Marguerite Perche nel 1100, nel Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 20 giugno 1119, nel Caen, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Préaux, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry de Beaumont 1st Earl of Warwickが1046年にフランスノーマンディマンチェデネヴィルで生まれた時，父Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouenは24歳，母Adeline or Adeliza de Meulanは32歳であった。1100年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアでMarguerite Percheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1119年6月20日にフランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスケンで73歳で死去し，フランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメプルeアウックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Beaumont 1st Earl of Warwick(이)가 1046년 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 데네빌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1100년 영국 워윅실르에서 Marguerite Perche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1119년 6월 20일 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 카이에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 플e오스에 묻혔다.

mn.Hastings, Sussex, England: Hastings, Sūþsēaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Beaumont 1st Earl of Warwick nasceu em 1046, em Denneville, Manche, Normandie, França, seu pai, Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Marguerite Perche em 1100, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de junho de 1119, em Caen, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Préaux, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Beaumont 1st Earl of Warwick родился в 1046 г. в местности денневилл, манч, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Marguerite Perche в 1100 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 20 июня 1119 г. в местности каен, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности прeаукс, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry de Beaumont 1st Earl of Warwick nació en 1046, en Denneville, Manche, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Marguerite Perche en 1100, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 20 de junio de 1119, en Caen, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Préaux, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia.
